parameters.jsCode:
// Build a complete prompt with real data embedded as a string
// This avoids relying on n8n template expressions for data injection
const item = $input.first();
const sheetName = item.json.sheetName;
const rows = item.json.rows;
const rowCount = item.json.rowCount;
const dataStr = JSON.stringify(rows);

const instructions = {
  demand_global: `Analyse the sheet "demand_global" (${rowCount} rows total, last ${rows.length} rows provided).
- Compare current month volume vs M-1: give % and absolute number.
- Compare current month vs same month previous year: give % and absolute number.
- Summarise the 1-year trend: globally increasing or decreasing vs previous year?
Use bullet points. English only. Use REAL numbers from the data only.`,

  demand_transaction: `Analyse the sheet "demand_transaction" (columns: date, segment.transaction, volume). ${rowCount} rows total.
- Per segment, compare current month vs M-1: % and absolute.
- Per segment, compare current month vs same month previous year: % and absolute.
- Which segments are increasing vs decreasing?
Use bullet points. English only. Use REAL numbers from the data only.`,

  ranking_global_war: `Analyse the sheet "ranking_global_war" (columns: date, url_hostname, rank_organic_war). ${rowCount} rows total.
- What is Seloger Neuf current rank vs competitors?
- Has the rank improved or declined over the last months?
Use bullet points. English only. Use REAL numbers from the data only.`,

  demand_asset: `Analyse the sheet "demand_asset". ${rowCount} rows total.
- Global demand trend month over month: give % evolution per month.
- Per asset type: increasing, stable or decreasing?
Use bullet points. English only. Use REAL numbers from the data only.`,

  demand_departement: `Analyse the sheet "demand_departement". ${rowCount} rows total.
- Top 10 departments by volume for the last 3 months.
- For each: increasing, stable or decreasing over the last 3 months?
Use bullet points. English only. Use REAL numbers from the data only.`,

  demand_explorer: `Analyse the sheet "demand_explorer" (columns include MoM and YoY growth). ${rowCount} rows total.
- Which keywords have the highest YoY growth?
- Which are trend_type = growing?
Use bullet points. English only. Use REAL numbers from the data only.`,

  demand_region: `Analyse the sheet "demand_region". ${rowCount} rows total.
- Top regions by search volume.
- Which regions are growing the fastest?
Use bullet points. English only. Use REAL numbers from the data only.`,

  audience: `Analyse the sheet "audience". ${rowCount} rows total.
- Compare nonbrand vs brand vs anonymous click share (%).
- Has the split changed recently?
Use bullet points. English only. Use REAL numbers from the data only.`
};

const instruction = instructions[sheetName] || `Analyse the sheet "${sheetName}" (${rowCount} rows). Provide key facts with real numbers from the data. Bullet points, English only.`;

const prompt = `You are a SEO and real estate analyst specialised in the French new residential market.

You receive REAL data from a digital performance spreadsheet. Use ONLY the numbers present in the data below — do NOT use placeholders like XX% or YY units.

Sheet: "${sheetName}"
Total rows: ${rowCount}
Data (last ${rows.length} rows):
${dataStr}

${instruction}`;

return [{ json: { sheetName, prompt } }];
